PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF OROPEZA, GUADALUPE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ESCOBAR, JUAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT OROPEZA, GUADALUPE CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. CROSS-COMPLAINANT DID NOT SUSTAIN HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION FOR REHEARING DENIED WITH PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OROPEZA, GUADALUPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, JUAN $2,976.61 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,028.61 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-29-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-02-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT REFUSED TO STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER.
